historicalIssues: Malformed API payloads previously crashed the single-file workspace.
Workspace polling previously transferred and reparsed complete state.
Unbounded task rendering and repeated listeners previously raised CPU and memory use.
gates.estimatedCost: Usually under 2 minutes on this Mac; measured on every run.
gates.sleepCondition: Never sleeps for frontend changes; skipped for changes outside frontend and its API contracts.

gates.trigger: Only when rendered UI, layout, typography, interaction or visual assets change
checks: Browser screenshots at desktop and compact widths
No overlap, clipping or incoherent scrolling
historicalIssues: Task cards and office sprites have previously overflowed their containers.
Visual changes have previously looked different in the live page than in isolated inspection.
gates.estimatedCost: Interactive browser pass; no cost for non-UI changes.
gates.sleepCondition: Dormant when no user-visible pixels or interactions changed.

gates.trigger: Default-route switch, release candidate or broad cross-view refactor
historicalIssues: A production route once served a stale page after a partial frontend restart.
Settings and office views previously depended on legacy-only behavior.
gates.estimatedCost: Several minutes; intentionally excluded from routine work.
gates.sleepCondition: Dormant outside release, route-switch and broad shell changes.

checks: automatic legacy rollback after repeated hard failures
historicalIssues: Long-running workers and polling loops have previously accumulated memory.
Single early HTTP probes have previously misclassified slow startup as failure.
gates.estimatedCost: 8 hours wall time with a low-frequency local probe.
gates.sleepCondition: Dormant for routine development; starts only for release canaries.
